'''zashudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dymonde|dymonde]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dymonde|dymonde]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zashudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæshidith|zæshidith]] || [[word:zæshidij|zæshidij]] || [[word:zæshidish|zæshidish]] || [[word:zæshidi|zæshidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zashushuduth|zashushuduth]] || [[word:zashushuduj|zashushuduj]] || [[word:zashushudush|zashushudush]] || [[word:zashushudu|zashushudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zashuduth|zashuduth]] || [[word:zashuduj|zashuduj]] || [[word:zashudush|zashudush]] || [[word:zashudu|zashudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zashufduth|zashufduth]] || [[word:zashufduj|zashufduj]] || [[word:zashufdush|zashufdush]] || [[word:zashufduf|zashufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zashuduthu|zashuduthu]] || [[word:zashuduju|zashuduju]] || [[word:zashudushu|zashudushu]] || [[word:zashuduku|zashuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zashuduth|zashuduth]] || [[word:zashuduj|zashuduj]] || [[word:zashudush|zashudush]] || [[word:zashudu|zashudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zashuduthul|zashuduthul]] || [[word:zashudujul|zashudujul]] || [[word:zashudushul|zashudushul]] || [[word:zashudukul|zashudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zashuduthuthu|zashuduthuthu]] || [[word:zashudujuju|zashudujuju]] || [[word:zashudushushu|zashudushushu]] || [[word:zashuduku|zashuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zashuduthun|zashuduthun]] || [[word:zashudujun|zashudujun]] || [[word:zashudushun|zashudushun]] || [[word:zashudukun|zashudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zashuduthuoro|zashuduthuoro]] || [[word:zashudujuoro|zashudujuoro]] || [[word:zashudushuoro|zashudushuoro]] || [[word:zashudukuoro|zashudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
